entries.evidence_summary: Photonic power, magnetic flux density, angle, gravity/local curvature and relative mass language appear in an early FCEA symbolic physics formula.
entries.next_action: Separate literal physics, symbolic layer and measurable quantities.

entries.evidence_summary: The file explicitly integrates photonic thrust, gravity, magnetism, bioengineering, metamaterials and living-consciousness language, with DNA resonance and photonic memory headings.
entries.next_action: Define whether metamaterial is physical design, analogy, or placeholder; map to measurable electromagnetic properties.

entries.evidence_summary: The file models an RNAMensageiroSimbiotico class and uses RNA, epigenetic memory, probiotics/parasites and organelles as adaptive information-processing metaphors.
entries.next_action: Create DNA/RNA processing glossary separating molecular computing, bioinformatics and symbolic code.

entries.evidence_summary: Modified Fibonacci and galaxy spiral observation trail appears before the later RLL consolidation.
entries.next_action: Attach image provenance and quantitative spiral-fit comparison.

entries.evidence_summary: The file lists plasma gravity, quantum plasma flows, gauge/topological effects, AdS/CFT and hyperdimensional vectors as topic seeds.
entries.next_action: Split topics into formal physics terms, speculative hypotheses and symbolic metaphors.

entries.evidence_summary: The file is an explicit physics-chemistry-biology ledger with 30 biology, physiology and chemistry concepts and applications.
entries.next_action: Extract each concept into a table with real formula, units, source, and claim boundary.

entries.evidence_summary: The file links mycorrhizae, bacteria, mRNA, plasmids, viruses and horizontal biological information flow in a living-cycle narrative.
entries.next_action: Map each biological mechanism to established references and symbolic extensions.

entries.evidence_summary: The document analyzes thermodynamics, light generation, radioactive waste, energy-matter transformation, TRL and safety/efficiency recommendations.
entries.next_action: Connect each energy claim to thermodynamic accounting and safety constraints.

entries.evidence_summary: RLL PR #1 preserves and centralizes a Friedmann-like equation with photonic/coherence, magnetic and plasma terms.
entries.next_action: Tie equation to loader, covariance, perturbation model and model comparison gates.

entries.evidence_summary: RLL PR #2 connects photonic/nonlocality concepts to cosmological superposition, dark-sector behavior and observational tests.
entries.next_action: Verify references, link datasets and run formal comparisons.

entries.evidence_summary: Quasicrystal terms were not confirmed literally in the first pass. Adjacent crystal, semiconductor, metamaterial and fractal material trails exist.
entries.next_action: Search branches and older/private files for quasicrystal synonyms and material diffraction/aperiodic-lattice terms.
